name: english-coach
description: English Coach — voice-first English trainer, a fork of Fluent (AI Language Learning Kit). Fluent core: spaced repetition (SM-2), active recall, adaptive difficulty, tracking across 6 databases. Adds a voice conversation loop (/talk) and a weekly coaching program. Daily practice: /talk, /fluent-review, /fluent-vocab, /fluent-writing, /fluent-reading. Start with /fluent-setup.
